---
title: "Human Speech: 39 Bits Per Second"
description: "Amazing how much 39 bps can do."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-09-05"
categories: [linguistics, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Human speech may have a universal transmission rate. Image from [Science](https://www.science.org/content/article/human-speech-may-have-universal-transmission-rate-39-bits-second).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Amazing how much 39 bps can do.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_human-speech-may-have-a-universal-transmission-activity-6575279541860868098-ZhmI).*
